character.definition: melancholy; grievous; mournful; sad, anxious and fearful, extremely sad
(same as 研) to rub; to grind; to powder, to go the very source; to study; to investigate; to research; to examine; to search into carefully
(interchangeable 黓) black, color of the wine, sweet; honeyed; or pleasing
surname; name of an ancient state
pass buck, lay blame on others
the passive, female principle in Chinese philosophy (yin); dark; secret
time of famine or crop failure
to tie a knot; join or tie fast
